name: eu_ai_act
description: EU AI Act compliance checks — Articles 9 (Risk Management), 13 (Transparency), 14 (Human Oversight). High-risk AI systems require documented authority limits, explicit tiers, platform constraints, and no secrets.

rules.name: [Art. 9] Risk Management: Tier Classification
rules.description: EU AI Act Article 9 requires a documented risk classification system. Agent tiers serve as risk classifiers.

rules.name: [Art. 9] Risk Management: Authority Limits
rules.description: AI systems in high-risk categories must have bounded operational authority.

rules.name: [Art. 13] Transparency: Platform Bindings
rules.description: AI systems must transparently declare which systems they interact with.

rules.name: [Art. 14] Human Oversight: Denied Actions
rules.description: Systems must have explicit action denylists to facilitate human oversight and intervention.
